title: People and Places
drDigitalIntro: Photos automatically recognizes faces in your photos and groups them. You can name people ('Mom', 'Dad', 'Grandma') and Photos will find all photos of that person. Places shows where photos were taken on a map. Memories is an automatic feature that creates slideshows of your best moments from a specific time period or location.

playgroundTask.question: Photos recognizes faces to help you:

options.text: Edit and retouch portrait photos automatically
Find all photos that include a specific person
Print photos at the right size

drDigitalSuccess: Face recognition lets you search by person — name someone once and Photos can show you all their photos instantly.
drDigitalHint: The People album groups photos by the faces in them. Name the face once and Photos does the rest.
